pi_items.source: Downloaded the real ml-100k dataset and calculated the mean rating from u.data.
Downloaded the real ml-100k dataset and counted the occurrences of 5-star ratings in u.data.
Calculated the mean of the 10 rating values (three 5s, six 2s, one 1) hardcoded in export_result.sh.
Counted the 5-star ratings in the synthetic dataset hardcoded in export_result.sh.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the real MovieLens 100k dataset is downloaded and used, containing exactly 21,201 5-star ratings and an average rating of 3.53. Also confirmed that the verifier's anti-gaming check replaces this with a 10-line synthetic dataset (three 5s, six 2s, one 1) which correctly evaluates to an average of 2.80 and three 5-star ratings.
